auth.errorUnknown: Something went wrong. Please try again.
auth.forgotPasswordHint: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.
auth.resetSent: If that email has an account, a reset link is on its way.
auth.resetSuccess: Password updated. You can sign in now.
auth.missingToken: This link is invalid or incomplete. Please request a new one.
auth.checkEmail: We've sent a confirmation link to your email address. Click it to activate your account.
auth.confirmSuccess: Email confirmed. You can sign in now.

settings.title: Settings
settings.errorUnknown: Something went wrong. Please try again.
settings.deleteWarning: Deleting your account is permanent. Your subscription is cancelled and all your data is removed.
settings.deleteConfirmHint: Enter your current password to confirm.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.noSubscription: You don't have an active subscription.

subscribe.title: Subscribe
subscribe.description: Unlock full access with a Pro subscription.
subscribe.errorUnknown: Something went wrong. Please try again.

subscribeSuccess.title: You're subscribed!
subscribeSuccess.description: Your subscription is now active. Thank you.

subscribeCancel.title: Payment cancelled
subscribeCancel.description: No charge was made. You can try again whenever you're ready.
